quests.title: Compliment Marathon
quests.description: Give your partner 5 genuine, unique compliments throughout the day.

quests.title: Digital Detox Hour
quests.description: Put both phones in a drawer and spend 60 minutes talking or playing a game.

quests.title: The Culinary Experiment
quests.description: Cook a meal together using at least one ingredient neither of you has tried before.

quests.title: Memory Lane
quests.description: Look through your first 20 photos together and share what you were feeling in each.

quests.title: Quick Fix
quests.description: Identify one small thing in the house that's broken or messy and fix it together.

quests.title: The IKEA Challenge
quests.description: Assemble a piece of furniture or organize a complex closet without a single argument.

quests.title: Sunrise Serenity
quests.description: Wake up early together to watch the sunrise with a coffee or tea.

quests.title: Future Casting
quests.description: Write down three things you want to achieve as a couple in the next 5 years.

quests.title: Playlist of Us
quests.description: Create a 10-song playlist that defines your relationship history.

quests.title: Love Note Hide-and-Seek
quests.description: Hide a physical love note somewhere your partner will find it later.

quests.title: Local Tourist
quests.description: Visit a landmark or museum in your city that you’ve both never been to.

quests.title: Morning Stretch
quests.description: Complete a 10-minute yoga or stretching routine together.

quests.title: The Chore Swap
quests.description: Switch your usual chores for the day (e.g., if you cook, they cook).

quests.title: Eye Contact Challenge
quests.description: Sit in silence and maintain eye contact for 3 full minutes.

quests.title: Picnic Floor
quests.description: Have a full dinner on a blanket on the living room floor instead of the table.

quests.title: Appreciation Station
quests.description: Write a list of 10 things you appreciate about how your partner handles stress.

quests.title: Book Club for Two
quests.description: Read the same chapter of a book and discuss it over drinks.

quests.title: Grocery Grand Prix
quests.description: Get through the weekly grocery shopping in under 20 minutes as a team.

quests.title: Volunteer Duo
quests.description: Spend 4 hours volunteering for a local charity or community event.

quests.title: No-Spend Weekend
quests.description: Go a full 48 hours without spending money on non-essentials.

quests.title: Water Plants Together
quests.description: Tend to all the indoor or garden plants as a team activity.

quests.title: Blind Taste Test
quests.description: Blindfold one partner and have them guess 5 different snacks.

quests.title: Dream Home Blueprint
quests.description: Sketch or describe your 'dream house' layout in detail.

quests.title: Handwritten Mail
quests.description: Write and mail a physical letter to your partner’s parents or a relative.

quests.title: The Ultimate Clean
quests.description: Deep clean the entire bathroom together until it sparkles.

quests.title: TikTok Dance Duo
quests.description: Learn and record a 15-second trending TikTok dance together (posting is optional!).

quests.title: The Blue Door Hunt
quests.description: Go for a drive or walk and find a house with a blue door. Take a selfie in front of it.

quests.title: Voice Note Love Letter
quests.description: Send a 60-second voice note explaining one specific reason why you fell in love with them.

quests.title: The Grocery Secret
quests.description: Go to the store and buy one snack you loved as a child but haven't had in years to share.

quests.title: Mural Masterpiece
quests.description: Find a piece of street art or a mural in town and take a 'creative' photo of your partner in front of it.

quests.title: The 5-Minute Room Reset
quests.description: Set a timer for 5 minutes and race to clean the messiest room in the house together.

quests.title: Podcast Exchange
quests.description: Listen to a 30+ minute podcast episode recommended by your partner and discuss it.

quests.title: Flashlight Fort
quests.description: Build a blanket fort in the living room and watch a movie inside it.

quests.title: The 'No Complain' 24 Hours
quests.description: Go a full 24 hours without uttering a single complaint about anything. Harder than it looks!

quests.title: Mirror Message
quests.description: Use a dry-erase marker (or a post-it) to leave a sweet message on the bathroom mirror.

quests.title: Recipe Roulette
quests.description: Open a cookbook to a random page and cook the first recipe you see, no matter how weird.

quests.title: Local Legend Search
quests.description: Find the oldest building in your town and take a photo of the plaque or foundation date.

quests.title: Window Shopping Dreams
quests.description: Go to a high-end store or car dealership and pick out exactly what you'd buy if you won the lottery.

quests.title: The 20-Pushup Challenge
quests.description: Complete 20 pushups (or a 1-minute plank) side-by-side.

quests.title: Snail Mail Surprise
quests.description: Buy a postcard, write a secret message, and mail it to your partner from the local post office.

quests.title: Car Karaoke Session
quests.description: Record a video of you two singing a duet at the top of your lungs while parked or driving.

quests.title: The 'Yes' Menu
quests.description: Go to a restaurant and let your partner order your entire meal for you.

quests.title: Plant a Seed
quests.description: Buy a packet of seeds and a pot, and plant them together. Commit to keeping it alive!

quests.title: Home Movie Night
quests.description: Watch at least 30 minutes of old family videos or videos from the early days of your relationship.

quests.title: The Ultimate Junk Drawer Fix
quests.description: Tackle that one 'junk drawer' in the kitchen and organize it perfectly.

quests.title: Strangers' Kindness
quests.description: Pay for the coffee or meal of the person behind you in line as a couple.

quests.title: New Hobby Trial
quests.description: Watch a YouTube tutorial for a skill neither of you has (origami, coding, drawing) and try it for 30 mins.

quests.title: Park Bench People Watching
quests.description: Sit on a public bench for 20 minutes and make up elaborate backstories for the people passing by.

quests.title: The 10-Minute Car Detail
quests.description: Spend 10 minutes cleaning all the trash and dust out of the car interior together.

quests.title: Handwritten Gratitude
quests.description: Write a list of 5 things your partner did this week that made your life easier.

quests.title: The Vulnerability Vault
quests.description: Share one childhood fear you’ve never told your partner before.

quests.title: Heartbeat Sync
quests.description: Lay together in silence for 10 minutes, focusing only on the sound of each other's breathing.

quests.title: The 'Love Shape' Hunt
quests.description: Go for a walk and find an object in nature that is naturally shaped like a heart. Send a photo.

quests.title: Bucket List 2030
quests.description: Write down 5 major life goals you want to achieve together in the next 10 years.

quests.title: The 'New Territory' Coffee
quests.description: Drive to a neighborhood you've never visited and find a local coffee shop to sit in.

quests.title: Hobby Shadowing
quests.description: Spend 30 minutes watching or helping your partner with their solo hobby (e.g., gaming, crafting, coding).

quests.title: The 7-Minute Hug
quests.description: Give your partner a continuous 7-minute hug (set a timer!) to release oxytocin.

quests.title: Secret Code Language
quests.description: Invent a secret code word or hand signal that means 'I love you' or 'Let's leave' for public use.

quests.title: State of the Union
quests.description: Ask: 'What is one thing I did this week that made you feel safe?' Listen without interrupting.

quests.title: Time Capsule Selfie
quests.description: Take a selfie together, write a caption for your 'future selves,' and save it in a hidden folder.

quests.title: Geo-Caching Date
quests.description: Download a geocaching app and find at least one hidden 'treasure' in your city.

quests.title: The Support Swap
quests.description: Ask: 'What is your biggest stressor this week?' and come up with one way you can help.

quests.title: Sensory Dinner
quests.description: Feed each other three different snacks while one partner is blindfolded. Guess the flavors.

quests.title: Red Light Photo Op
quests.description: Next time you are at a red light (as a passenger!), take a silly 'model' photo of your partner.

quests.title: The Apology Tour
quests.description: Apologize for one small recurring habit you know annoys them, and commit to fixing it for 48 hours.

quests.title: The 'Us' Perennial
quests.description: Buy a plant that lives for years and find a permanent spot for it in your home or garden.

quests.title: Peak Performance
quests.description: Hike or walk to the highest physical point in your local area and take a victory photo.

quests.title: Meditation Duo
quests.description: Complete a 10-minute guided 'loving-kindness' meditation together.

quests.title: Compliment Post-Its
quests.description: Leave 3 Post-It notes in 3 different rooms, each listing a physical trait you adore about them.

quests.title: Meme War
quests.description: Send 5 memes today that specifically remind you of an inside joke you share.

quests.title: The 'Safe Space' Question
quests.description: Ask: 'What do I do that makes you feel most loved?' and write the answer in your notes.

quests.title: Travel Vision Board
quests.description: Create a digital collage of the top 3 countries you want to visit together.

quests.title: Midnight Drive
quests.description: Go for a 15-minute drive at night with no destination, just listening to your favorite album.

quests.title: Financial Dream Talk
quests.description: Discuss one thing you’d love to buy together if you saved up for a whole year.

quests.title: Digital Will
quests.description: Share your phone passcodes or emergency contact info with each other (if you haven't yet).

quests.title: The Park Lap Challenge
quests.description: Go to a local park and walk one full lap while holding hands the entire time.

quests.title: Thrift Store Style-Off
quests.description: Go to a thrift store with a $10 budget and pick out the 'coolest' outfit for each other.

quests.title: Double Date Diplomat
quests.description: Reach out and organize a dinner or activity with another couple you haven't seen in a while.

quests.title: Gamer’s Alliance
quests.description: Play a cooperative video game together for at least 45 minutes (no vs. mode!).

quests.title: The Great Cupcake-Off
quests.description: Bake a batch of cupcakes and compete to see who can decorate theirs the most creatively.

quests.title: Sunrise Yoga
quests.description: Follow a 15-minute beginner yoga video together right after waking up.

quests.title: The Bridge Selfie
quests.description: Find a bridge (even a small one in a park) and take a panoramic photo together.

quests.title: Five-Minute Meditation
quests.description: Sit back-to-back and meditate in silence for 5 minutes.

quests.title: Mystery Text Message
quests.description: Send your partner a text that is just three emojis. They have to guess the secret meaning.

quests.title: Recipe Recreation
quests.description: Find a photo of a meal you ate on your first date (or early on) and try to cook it at home.

quests.title: The Grocery Charity Run
quests.description: Go to the store and pick out 5 items to donate to a local food bank together.

quests.title: Bird Watching Bingo
quests.description: Go outside and stay until you have spotted three different species of birds.

quests.title: The 'No-Tech' Picnic
quests.description: Eat lunch outside with no phones allowed on your person.

quests.title: Language Lab
quests.description: Learn how to say 'I love you' and 'You are beautiful' in a language neither of you speaks.

quests.title: The Backyard Campout
quests.description: Set up a tent or a sleeping bag fort in the backyard (or balcony) and spend 2 hours stargazing.

quests.title: Puzzle Piece Partnership
quests.description: Start a jigsaw puzzle together and complete at least the entire border.

quests.title: The Weekend Trip Map
quests.description: Pin 3 locations on a map within a 3-hour drive that you want to visit this year.

quests.title: Fitness Face-off
quests.description: See who can hold a plank the longest. The winner gets to pick the next movie!

quests.title: Letter to the Future
quests.description: Write a letter to yourselves to be opened in exactly one year. Seal it in an envelope.

quests.title: Karaoke Kitchen
quests.description: Use a wooden spoon as a mic and perform one full song for your partner.

quests.title: Secret Menu Hunt
quests.description: Go to a fast-food chain and try to order an item from a 'secret menu' you found online.

quests.title: The Healthy Prep
quests.description: Spend Sunday afternoon prepping healthy snacks (fruit, nuts, veggies) for the week together.

quests.title: Home Workout Hero
quests.description: Complete a 30-minute high-intensity interval training (HIIT) session together.

quests.title: Public Display of Affection
quests.description: Give your partner a long, dramatic kiss in a crowded public place.

quests.title: The Local Event Scout
quests.description: Find a local flyer or community board and attend the next free event listed on it.

quests.title: The Great Furniture Shuffle
quests.description: Rearrange the layout of one room in the house to give it a fresh 'new home' vibe.

quests.title: Inner Child Interview
quests.description: Ask your partner: 'What was your favorite way to play when you were 8?' and really listen.

quests.title: Scent of a Sanctuary
quests.description: Go to a store together and pick out a signature candle or diffuser scent for your bedroom.

quests.title: The Forgiveness Letter
quests.description: Write down one thing you've been holding onto and physically tear up the paper to let it go.

quests.title: Gallery Wall Design
quests.description: Select 5 photos of your favorite memories and find a place to display them together.

quests.title: Personality Test Night
quests.description: Both take the Enneagram or Myers-Briggs test and discuss how your types interact.

quests.title: The Pantry Purge
quests.description: Go through the pantry together and throw away everything expired. Victory dance required.

quests.title: Love Language Check-In
quests.description: Discuss if your primary love languages have shifted recently and how to better meet them.

quests.title: The 'Hidden' Park Picnic
quests.description: Find a park on Google Maps you've never visited and have a 20-minute coffee date there.

quests.title: Shared Vision Board
quests.description: Create a Pinterest board of 'Home Goals' and add at least 10 items you both love.

quests.title: Gratitude Jar Launch
quests.description: Find a jar and write three things you’re grateful for today to start a new habit.

quests.title: The 10-Minute Tech Help
quests.description: Help your partner fix one annoying digital problem (organizing files, updating apps).

quests.title: Sunset Chase
quests.description: Drive until you find the best possible view of the sunset and take a silhouette photo.

quests.title: Values Alignment
quests.description: List your top 3 life values (e.g., freedom, security, fun) and see where they overlap.

quests.title: Lightbulb Moment
quests.description: Walk through the house and replace every single burnt-out or flickering bulb together.

quests.title: Bake a Secret Ingredient
quests.description: Bake cookies but add one 'mystery' ingredient (like sea salt or chili). Partner must guess it.

quests.title: Podcast Walk
quests.description: Go for a walk while sharing a pair of headphones, listening to the same story/episode.

quests.title: The Guest Room Refresh
quests.description: Make the guest bed and declutter the space so it’s ready for a visitor at any time.

quests.title: Compliment Mirror
quests.description: Write a compliment on the mirror using a dry-erase marker for the other person to find.

quests.title: Travel Documentary Date
quests.description: Watch a documentary about a country you want to visit and take notes on what to see.

quests.title: The 'Ask Me Anything'
quests.description: Set a timer for 10 minutes where one person can ask anything and the other must be honest.

quests.title: Emergency Kit Audit
quests.description: Check your first aid kit or car emergency bag and restock anything missing.

quests.title: Physical Touch Prayer
quests.description: Spend 5 minutes just holding hands and telling each other one thing you hope for the other.

quests.title: Local Bakery Hunt
quests.description: Find a bakery you’ve never been to and buy the most 'unusual' looking pastry they have.

quests.title: Bed Linen Deep Clean
quests.description: Strip the bed, wash everything, and put on fresh, crisp sheets together.

quests.title: The 1-Star Review Laugh
quests.description: Find the funniest 1-star review for a place you both actually love. Send it to your partner.

quests.title: Zillow Dream Mansion
quests.description: Find the most expensive house currently for sale in your zip code and pick which room would be yours.

quests.title: The 10,000 Step Trek
quests.description: Go for a long walk or hike and don't stop until both of your fitness trackers hit 10k steps.

quests.title: Wikipedia Rabbit Hole
quests.description: Start on the page for 'Love' and see who can reach the page for 'Space Exploration' in the fewest clicks.

quests.title: Yearbook Roast Night
quests.description: Find your old high school photos (or social media archives) and laugh at your questionable fashion choices.

quests.title: The Teenage Anthem Hour
quests.description: Listen to a playlist of songs that were popular when you were 15 and share your 'coolest' memory.

quests.title: Google Earth Time Travel
quests.description: Use Google Earth to show your partner the exact house you grew up in and describe your old bedroom.

quests.title: Pickleball Partner Trial
quests.description: Go to a local court and play a racket sport (tennis, pickleball, badminton) for 45 minutes.

quests.title: The $20 Blind Date
quests.description: Go to a store with exactly $20 and buy everything needed for a 'complete' date night experience.

quests.title: First-Ever Text Search
quests.description: Scroll all the way back to the very first text message you ever sent each other and read it aloud.

quests.title: The Neighborhood Dog Bingo
quests.description: Go for a walk and stay out until you have spotted five different breeds of dogs.

quests.title: Bike to Breakfast
quests.description: Ride bicycles to a local cafe or bakery instead of driving.

quests.title: Childhood Toy Story
quests.description: Describe the one toy you loved most as a child and why it was so special to you.

quests.title: The Local Library Discovery
quests.description: Visit your local library and each check out one book that the other person chooses for you.

quests.title: Sunset Jog Duo
quests.description: Go for a light 20-minute jog together while the sun is setting.

quests.title: Street View Time Machine
quests.description: Find a location on Google Street View that has changed drastically over the years and discuss it.

quests.title: The No-Mirror Outfit
quests.description: Pick out a full outfit for your partner without letting them see a mirror until they are fully dressed.

quests.title: Random Recipe Reel
quests.description: Find a 'viral' cooking video on social media and attempt to make it together tonight.

quests.title: Letter to Your 10-Year-Old Self
quests.description: Each write a short paragraph to your younger selves and read them to each other.

quests.title: The Trio Selfie Hunt
quests.description: Find a fountain, a statue, and a pink wall in your city. Take a selfie at all three.

quests.title: Old Movie Marathon
quests.description: Watch a movie that was released the year you were born.

quests.title: Morning Affirmation Voice Note
quests.description: Send a voice note while you’re apart listing three things your partner is doing 'right' lately.

quests.title: The Park Bench People-Watch
quests.description: Sit in a busy public area for 15 minutes and try to guess the life stories of people passing by.

quests.title: Digital Photo Clean-Up
quests.description: Sit together and delete 100 blurry or duplicate photos from your shared digital library.

quests.title: First Impression Share
quests.description: Tell the story of what you actually thought of the other person the very first time you met.

coupons.title: 10-Minute Foot Rub
coupons.description: Redeem for a relaxing foot massage after a long day.

coupons.title: Movie Choice Veto
coupons.description: You get the final say on what we watch tonight, no questions asked.

coupons.title: Breakfast in Bed
coupons.description: Your partner prepares and serves your favorite breakfast while you stay in bed.

coupons.title: Get Out of Laundry Free
coupons.description: Your partner handles your share of the laundry for one full cycle.

coupons.title: Chef for a Night
coupons.description: A 3-course meal cooked specifically to your cravings.

coupons.title: The 'Snooze' Pass
coupons.description: Your partner handles all morning responsibilities (pets, kids, coffee) so you can sleep in.

coupons.title: Professional Style Massage
coupons.description: A 45-minute full body massage with oils and music.

coupons.title: Playlist Takeover
coupons.description: You control the music in the car for the entire duration of the trip.

coupons.title: Dishwashing Immunity
coupons.description: You are exempt from doing the dishes for the next three meals.

coupons.title: Dessert on Demand
coupons.description: Your partner must go out or bake to provide you with a sweet treat right now.

coupons.title: Winning the Argument
coupons.description: Instantly end a minor disagreement by 'winning'—no more talking about it!

coupons.title: Weekend of Zero Chores
coupons.description: You don't have to lift a finger for housework from Saturday morning to Sunday night.

coupons.title: Phone-Free Date Night
coupons.description: Your partner must keep their phone off for the entire duration of the date.

coupons.title: Car Detail Service
coupons.description: Your partner will wash and vacuum the interior of your car.

coupons.title: Pick the Takeout
coupons.description: You choose the restaurant for dinner with no 'I don't know' or 'not that' allowed.

coupons.title: A 'Yes' Day
coupons.description: Your partner must say 'Yes' to any reasonable request for the next 12 hours.

coupons.title: 1-Hour Deep Vent
coupons.description: Redeem for 60 minutes of uninterrupted listening while you vent about anything.

coupons.title: Starbucks (or Coffee) Run
coupons.description: Your partner goes out to get your favorite beverage and brings it back.

coupons.title: Custom Poetic Tribute
coupons.description: Your partner must write a poem or a song (regardless of skill) about why you're great.

coupons.title: The Grocery Hero
coupons.description: Your partner does the entire weekly grocery shop alone.

coupons.title: Spa Night at Home
coupons.description: Facemasks, cucumber eyes, foot soaks, and total relaxation provided by your partner.

coupons.title: Tech Support Session
coupons.description: Your partner helps you organize your digital files, photos, or fixes a tech annoyance.

coupons.title: Middle Seat Immunity
coupons.description: If traveling, you never have to take the 'lesser' seat/side/spot.

coupons.title: Afternoon Nap Pass
coupons.description: The partner takes care of all noise and distractions so you can nap for 2 hours.

coupons.title: Dream Date Night
coupons.description: Your partner plans, funds, and executes a surprise date based on your favorite things.

coupons.title: The 'I'm Right' Token
coupons.description: Redeem to instantly end any minor disagreement by being declared the winner.

coupons.title: 15-Minute Scalp Massage
coupons.description: Sit back while your partner gives you a relaxing, spa-like scalp massage.

coupons.title: Coffee Delivered to Bed
coupons.description: Your partner brings you your morning caffeine exactly how you like it before you get up.

coupons.title: The 'My Way' Car Route
coupons.description: You choose the GPS route or the music, and your partner cannot complain about traffic or your choice.

coupons.title: Cancel All Plans Card
coupons.description: Redeem this to stay in and do nothing, even if you had previous social engagements.

coupons.title: Personal Hype Person
coupons.description: For the next 30 minutes, your partner must praise everything you do and cheer you on.

coupons.title: Homemade Pizza Night
coupons.description: Your partner makes a pizza from scratch (or dough) with all your favorite toppings.

coupons.title: One Hour of Silence
coupons.description: Redeem for 60 minutes of total peace to read, game, or nap without being interrupted.

coupons.title: Pick the Next Date Theme
coupons.description: You decide the entire vibe (e.g., 'Fancy,' 'Lazy,' 'Retro') for the next date night.

coupons.title: The 'Don't Cook' Pass
coupons.description: It's your partner's turn to handle dinner, whether they cook or order takeout.

coupons.title: 30-Minute Cuddle Session
coupons.description: Drop everything for 30 minutes of uninterrupted cuddling/spooning.

coupons.title: Weekend Breakfast Out
coupons.description: Your partner treats you to breakfast or brunch at your favorite local spot.

coupons.title: You Pick the Grocery Snacks
coupons.description: On the next grocery run, you get to pick 3 'guilty pleasure' snacks with zero judgment.

coupons.title: Car Wash & Vacuum
coupons.description: Your partner takes your car to be cleaned or does it manually themselves.

coupons.title: The 'No Laundry' Weekend
coupons.description: You are officially banned from the laundry room; your partner handles it all.

coupons.title: Late Night Treat Run
coupons.description: Your partner must head out (or order) to get you a specific snack after 9 PM.

coupons.title: The 'I Choose the Outfit' Card
coupons.description: You get to pick what your partner wears for your next outing together.

coupons.title: Candlelight Bath for Two
coupons.description: Your partner sets up a romantic bath with candles, music, and bubbles.

coupons.title: Mystery Gift under $10
coupons.description: Your partner must find and buy you a small, thoughtful surprise within 24 hours.

coupons.title: Solo Shopping Trip
coupons.description: Partner stays home to handle chores/kids/pets while you go shop alone for 3 hours.

coupons.title: Walk the Dog Pass
coupons.description: Your partner handles all pet bathroom breaks/walks for the entire day.

coupons.title: Hand-Held Walk
coupons.description: Redeem for a 20-minute walk where your partner must hold your hand the whole time.

coupons.title: Social Media Shoutout
coupons.description: Your partner posts a photo of you with a sweet caption on their preferred platform.

coupons.title: Choose the Next Furniture/Decor
coupons.description: You get the final tie-breaking vote on the next item bought for the house.

coupons.title: The 'Ultimate Comfort' Night
coupons.description: Pajamas, blankets, your favorite snacks, and your favorite movie—all set up by your partner.

coupons.title: The Luxury Weekend Planner
coupons.description: The partner must plan, book, and organize a full 48-hour getaway. You just show up.

coupons.title: The 'No Questions Asked' Veto
coupons.description: Instantly cancel any plan or activity you aren't feeling, with zero explanation required.

coupons.title: Professional Photo Session
coupons.description: Partner pays for and organizes a professional photoshoot for you both (or just you!).

coupons.title: Emotional Safe Space Pass
coupons.description: Redeem for 2 hours of venting where your partner can only offer validation, no 'fixing.'

coupons.title: The 'Getaway Driver'
coupons.description: Your partner must drive you everywhere you need to go for one full week.

coupons.title: Designer Outfit Choice
coupons.description: Your partner picks and purchases one high-quality item of clothing for you.

coupons.title: Michelin-Tier Date Night
coupons.description: Redeem for a dinner at the fanciest restaurant in town, partner's treat.

coupons.title: Personal Hype Video
coupons.description: Your partner must edit a 60-second video of your best moments together with music.

coupons.title: 1-on-1 Hobby Lesson
coupons.description: Your partner pays for a class (cooking, art, dance) that you've wanted to try.

coupons.title: The All-Day Adulting Shield
coupons.description: Your partner handles every single chore, bill, and 'adult' task for 24 hours.

coupons.title: Staycation at a Local Hotel
coupons.description: Your partner books a local hotel room for one night just for a change of scenery.

coupons.title: Yes to One Adventure
coupons.description: Pick any activity (skydiving, camping, a concert) and your partner must say 'Yes.'

coupons.title: The Closet Purge Helper
coupons.description: Your partner helps you declutter your wardrobe for 3 hours with zero complaining.

coupons.title: Personalized Jewelry Gift
coupons.description: Redeem for a small, engraved, or meaningful piece of jewelry chosen by your partner.

coupons.title: No-Complaint Sunday
coupons.description: Your partner agrees to have a completely positive attitude for the whole day.

coupons.title: Deep Clean Service
coupons.description: Your partner either deep cleans the whole house or hires a professional service.

coupons.title: The 'Ultimate Breakfast' Feast
coupons.description: Waffles, eggs, fruit, bacon, mimosas—the works, prepared by your partner.

coupons.title: Sleep-In Until Noon
coupons.description: Your partner guards the door and keeps the house silent until you wake up naturally.

coupons.title: Subscription Pay-Off
coupons.description: Partner pays for 12 months of your favorite app or streaming service.

coupons.title: Custom Artwork Commission
coupons.description: Partner commissions a local artist to draw/paint a photo of you or your pet.

coupons.title: The Tech-Free Vacation Day
coupons.description: Partner agrees to a 24-hour total phone/computer ban while you spend the day together.

coupons.title: The 'Lifetime' Request
coupons.description: One massive favor (e.g., painting a room, attending a boring work event) used only once.

coupons.title: Private Concert
coupons.description: Partner must perform a song for you or find a street performer to play specifically for you.

coupons.title: Master of the Remote
coupons.description: You get total control over the TV and all streaming apps for an entire weekend.

coupons.title: The Surprise Bouquet
coupons.description: Your partner must bring you fresh flowers for no reason within the next 48 hours.

coupons.title: Skip the Gym Pass
coupons.description: Redeem this to get out of a planned workout with zero guilt or nagging.

coupons.title: The 'Last Bite' Rights
coupons.description: You get the final, most delicious bite of whatever your partner is eating.

coupons.title: Personal Stylist for a Day
coupons.description: Your partner must help you pick out outfits and give honest (but kind) fashion advice.

coupons.title: Gaming Win Concession
coupons.description: Your partner must let you win the next competitive game you play together.

coupons.title: The Morning Paper/Email Delivery
coupons.description: Partner brings you your laptop, the mail, or a physical paper while you stay in bed.

coupons.title: Dessert for Dinner
coupons.description: Redeem this to skip a healthy meal and eat only sweets for dinner tonight.

coupons.title: Professional Massage Session
coupons.description: Your partner pays for a 60-minute massage at a local spa for you.

coupons.title: 30 Minutes of Extra Sleep
coupons.description: Your partner takes over all loud morning tasks so you can sleep a bit longer.

coupons.title: Chore-Free Saturday
coupons.description: You are legally exempt from every single household task for the entire day.

coupons.title: Laundry Folding Service
coupons.description: Your partner must fold and put away two full baskets of your laundry.

coupons.title: Personal Chauffeur
coupons.description: Your partner drives you to three different errands of your choice.

coupons.title: Bedtime Story
coupons.description: Your partner must read a chapter of a book or make up a story for you as you fall asleep.

coupons.title: Snack Stash Refill
coupons.description: Your partner must go to the store and replenish your secret snack stash.

coupons.title: Social Media Hype Comment
coupons.description: Partner must leave a glowing, slightly embarrassing compliment on your latest post.

coupons.title: Lunch Delivery Service
coupons.description: Your partner brings you lunch at your place of work or wherever you are.

coupons.title: Custom Coffee Order
coupons.description: Your partner must make you a 'fancy' coffee at home with foam, art, or syrup.

coupons.title: Bath Bomb Evening
coupons.description: Your partner sets up a bath with a bath bomb, music, and a drink for you.

coupons.title: Closet Organization Helper
coupons.description: Your partner spends 1 hour helping you color-coordinate or declutter your closet.

coupons.title: Movie Theater Treat
coupons.description: Redeem for a trip to the cinema, including the largest popcorn on the menu.

coupons.title: The 'Ultimate Yes' Response
coupons.description: One time use: Partner must say 'Yes' to any reasonable weekend plan you suggest.

coupons.title: Weekend Sleep-In (Until 11 AM)
coupons.description: No alarms, no pets, no kids, no noise. Total silence until you wake up.

coupons.title: One Extra Dessert
coupons.description: Even if we said 'no more sweets,' this coupon grants you one bonus treat tonight.

coupons.title: Houseplant Caretaking
coupons.description: Your partner takes over all watering and plant-misting duties for the week.

coupons.title: Dream Trip Pitch
coupons.description: Partner must sit and listen to your full travel pitch with zero 'that's too expensive' comments.

coupons.title: Pick the Next Book
coupons.description: You choose the next book we read together or the next audiobook for the car.

coupons.title: Remote Control Sovereign
coupons.description: You have absolute control over the TV remote for the next 24 hours. No complaining allowed.

coupons.title: The Thermostat Dictator
coupons.description: Redeem to set the house temperature exactly where you want it for one evening.

coupons.title: First Shower Rights
coupons.description: You get the first shower and all the hot water for the next three days.

coupons.title: Professional Closet Design
coupons.description: Partner spends the afternoon installing shelving or organizers to make your closet perfect.

coupons.title: The 'I Told You So' Pass
coupons.description: When you're right, you can use this to gloat for 5 minutes without any pushback.

coupons.title: Car Gas Tank Bounty
coupons.description: Partner must take your car and return it with a completely full tank of gas.

coupons.title: Bedroom Mood Lighting
coupons.description: Partner must set up fairy lights, candles, or smart bulbs to create a romantic vibe.

coupons.title: The Weekend Cabin Retreat
coupons.description: Partner books a small cabin or Airbnb in nature for a quiet 2-night getaway.

coupons.title: The 'Pick My Outfit' Veto
coupons.description: You get to reject any outfit choice your partner makes for a night out and pick a new one.

coupons.title: No-Explanation Social Out
coupons.description: Use this to leave any party or social gathering the second you feel like it.

coupons.title: Full House Scent Overhaul
coupons.description: Partner buys new candles, soaps, and sprays to make the whole house smell like a spa.

coupons.title: The Gift of Silence
coupons.description: Your partner must refrain from talking about 'heavy' topics or chores for 4 hours.

coupons.title: Surprise Amazon Item
coupons.description: Partner must buy you one thing under $30 that has been sitting in your cart/wishlist.

coupons.title: The 'Front Seat' Forever
coupons.description: For the next week, you always get the front seat, even if friends are coming along.

coupons.title: Gourmet Picnic Basket
coupons.description: Partner must pack a basket with wine, cheese, and high-end snacks for a park trip.

coupons.title: The Ultimate Foot Soak
coupons.description: Warm water, Epsom salts, and a 20-minute scrub provided by your partner.

coupons.title: Window Washing Service
coupons.description: Partner cleans every window in the house (inside and out) until they are streak-free.

coupons.title: The 'Stay-in-Your-PJs' Day
coupons.description: Your partner handles all errands and public tasks so you can stay in your pajamas all day.

coupons.title: A Handwritten Poem
coupons.description: Your partner must write at least 8 lines of (sincere or funny) poetry about you.

coupons.title: The 'Aux Cord' Monopoly
coupons.description: You choose all the music for the next three car rides, no matter how long they are.

coupons.title: Personal Gardener for a Day
coupons.description: Partner pulls all weeds, prunes plants, and mows the lawn while you relax.

coupons.title: Ice Cream Sundae Bar
coupons.description: Partner sets up a station with 3 flavors and at least 5 different toppings.

coupons.title: The 'Clean Slate' Pass
coupons.description: Instantly end an argument about a past mistake—it can never be brought up again.

coupons.title: One Week of No Dishes
coupons.description: Partner is solely responsible for every dish, glass, and pan used for 7 days straight.

coupons.title: Morning Affirmation Text
coupons.description: Partner must send you a sweet, encouraging text every morning for one week.

coupons.title: The 'Emergency' Exit Card
coupons.description: Redeem this at any social event/party to leave immediately, no questions asked.

coupons.title: Boring Dinner Pass
coupons.description: Use this to get out of one social dinner or event that you really don't want to attend.

coupons.title: Social Media Post Takeover
coupons.description: You get to choose the photo and caption for your partner’s next social media post.

coupons.title: The 'I'm Exhausted' Shield
coupons.description: Redeem for 24 hours of total freedom from all chores, cooking, and social obligations.

coupons.title: Nostalgic Dinner Prep
coupons.description: Partner must cook a meal that reminds you specifically of your childhood home.

coupons.title: The 'Talk Me Out of It' Pass
coupons.description: Redeem when you're about to make an impulsive purchase; your partner must provide logic.

coupons.title: Guilty Pleasure Playlist Rights
coupons.description: You get to play your 'embarrassing' music in the car for 1 full hour with zero mocking.

coupons.title: The Phone-Free Evening
coupons.description: Both of you put phones in a lockbox from 6 PM until the next morning.

coupons.title: Mystery Delivery Credit
coupons.description: Partner must order you a surprise meal via DoorDash/UberEats without telling you what it is.

coupons.title: The Bedtime Backrub
coupons.description: Redeem for a 15-minute focused back massage before you go to sleep.

coupons.title: Social Battery Recharge
coupons.description: Redeem to spend the entire night in separate rooms doing your own hobbies in peace.

coupons.title: The 'Uber Song' Choice
coupons.description: You get to pick the music in the taxi/rideshare regardless of what anyone else wants.

coupons.title: One Night of Infinite Cuddles
coupons.description: Partner must agree to be the 'big spoon' (or your preferred position) all night long.

coupons.title: The Fashion Consultation
coupons.description: Partner must help you try on outfits and give detailed, helpful feedback for an upcoming event.

coupons.title: Personal Tech Support
coupons.description: Partner must spend 30 minutes organizing your phone storage or fixing a laptop issue.

coupons.title: Weekday Sleep-In
coupons.description: Partner handles the early morning routine (pets/coffee/etc.) on a work day so you can rest.

coupons.title: Weekend Trip Veto
coupons.description: If you don't like the proposed destination for a trip, use this to force a change.

coupons.title: High-End Dessert Delivery
coupons.description: Partner must source and deliver a gourmet dessert from a bakery (not a grocery store).

coupons.title: The Argument Truce
coupons.description: Instantly freeze any minor argument for 24 hours to let tempers cool down.

coupons.title: Grocery Bag Heavy Lifter
coupons.description: Partner must carry all groceries from the car to the kitchen in one trip (if possible!).

coupons.title: Private Karaoke Session
coupons.description: Partner must sing three songs of your choice for you in the living room.

coupons.title: The 'You're Right' Trophy
coupons.description: Partner must verbally admit 'You were right about [Topic]' and never bring it up again.

coupons.title: DIY Spa Manager
coupons.description: Partner must prep a foot soak, a face mask, and a robe for you to enjoy.

coupons.title: Nighttime Tea Service
coupons.description: Partner makes you a perfect cup of tea or cocoa right as you get into bed.

coupons.title: The Ultimate Compliment Card
coupons.description: Partner must write down 3 things they admire about your personality and read them aloud.
